name: ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells OEM aluminum forging products primarily in Taiwan. The company offers automotive aluminum forging parts, including brackets, control arms, suspension arms, pistons, etc. for use in suspension and cushion systems in car chassis, as well as in engine systems; and motorcycle aluminum forging parts, such as connectors, handgrips, driving arms, pistons, etc. that are used in the body structure of motorcycles, steering systems, and engine systems. It also provides other aluminum forging parts comprising storz, check handgrip, bundle, spray gun, etc. for use in fire-fighting equipment, industrial equipment, machinery industry, hand tool industry, and bicycle industry. ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.
